info.title: geoleaderboard Geoguessr Leaderboard Dataset
info.subtitle: Leaderboard data used on geoleaderboard website (updates daily)
info.description: This dataset provides comprehensive leaderboard data for the [geoleaderboard website](https://matt-op.github.io/geoleaderboard/), updated daily. It includes columns such as Rank, Username, Country, Rating, Division, Moving Rating, No Move Rating, and NMPZ Rating. Perfect for tracking player performances and analyzing patterns in the game of GeoGuessr.
